case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. MARTIN, MICHAEL R.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, MICHAEL R.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, MICHAEL R. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1685 SACRAMENTO ST #33, LEASE FORFEITED
